ice-cream-oreo-cookie-pie.name: Ice Cream Oreo Cookie Pie
instructions: Reserve 8 mini sandwich cookies for garnish. Place remaining cookies in a food processor or plastic bag and crush coarsely.
Stir crushed cookies into softened ice cream. Spread ice cream mixture into cookie crust and place in the freezer until set, about 1 hour.
Pipe whipped topping around the edge of pie and top with reserved cookies, standing on ends. Freeze before serving, 3 to 8 hours.

iced-tea-with-lemon-the-refreshing-summe.name: Iced Tea With Lemon, The Refreshing Summer Drink
iced-tea-with-lemon-the-refreshing-summe.original_name: Té helado con limón, la bebida refrescante del verano

ingredients.item: 4 bags of black tea (or your favorite tea)

instructions: He steals water into a pot or kettle. Once I'm boiling, remove her from the fire and add the tea bags. Let rest for 5-7 minutes, depending on the desired intensity.
Remove the tea bags and add the sugar while the tea is still hot, so that it will dissolve easily. It's good and cold at room temperature.

Expand the juice of a big lemon and mix with cold tea. You can set the amount of lemon as you choose. Fill a pitcher with ice and pour the tea with lemon onto it. Be sure you have enough ice to keep your drink cold.
It serves in high cups with more ice, decorating with lemon slices at the edge of the glass. Ready to enjoy!

instant-pot-bean-and-quinoa-soup.name: Instant Pot Bean And Quinoa Soup

ingredients.item: -oz. package dried central american red beans
ingredients.prep: such as Goya or Rancho Gordo Domingo Rojo

ingredients.item: . sauce from a can of chipotles in adobo

ingredients.prep: sliced avocado, sour cream, chopped cilantro, crumbled queso fresco or shredded cheddar or Monterey Jack, hot sauce, and/or tortilla strips (for serving)

instructions: Heat oil in an Instant Pot or other electric pressure cooker on the Sauté setting. Add onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until beginning to turn golden brown around the edges, 6–8 minutes. Add garlic and cumin and cook, stirring constantly, 2 minutes. Add beans, quinoa, adobo sauce, 2 tsp. salt, and 7 cups water. Lock lid and cook soup on high pressure 45 minutes, then release pressure manually. Squeeze in juice from lime half; mix well. Taste and season soup with more salt if needed.
Do Ahead: Soup can be made 2 days ahead. Let cool, then cover and chill. Soup will thicken; add up to 1 cup water before reheating over medium-low.
While the soup is cooking, toss onion, vinegar, salt, sugar, and 4 tsp. water in a small bowl to combine. Chill until ready to use.
To serve, ladle soup into bowls and top with pickled onions and other toppings of your choice.
Do Ahead: Onion can be pickled 5 days ahead. Cover and keep chilled.

instant-pot-egg-biryani.name: Instant Pot Egg Biryani
instructions: Wash the rice and soak it for 30 minutes.
In the sauté mode of instant pot, add whole garam masala spices, sliced onion, and green chili. When onions turn brown, add ginger, garlic paste, coriander and mint leaves..
In a separate frying pan, fry the eggs and season with salt and chilli powder.
Add curd and all powdered spices to the Instant Pot..
Cook for 5 minutes. Drain the rice and add to the Instant Pot. Add 2 cups of water.
Turn off the sauté mode and pressure cook on low pressure for 5 minutes.
Select natural pressure release for 2 minutes and then switch to quick release.
Plate the biryani and garnish with fried eggs, ghee and fried onions. Serve hot with gravy or raita.

instant-pot-salsa-chicken.name: Instant Pot Salsa Chicken
instructions: Place chicken breasts in a multi-functional cooker (such as Instant Pot). Sprinkle all sides with taco seasoning. Pour salsa and chicken broth on top.
Close and lock the lid. Select Poultry setting; set the timer for 15 minutes. Allow 10 to 15 minutes for pressure to build.
Release pressure using the natural-release method according to manufacturer's instructions, about 20 minutes. Unlock and remove the lid.
Shred chicken and serve as desired.

instant-pot-southern-style-green-beans-f.name: Instant Pot Southern-style Green Beans From A Can
instructions: Turn on a multi-functional pressure cooker (such as Instant Pot®) and select Saute function. Add bacon and cook until almost crispy, about 8 minutes. Take your time cooking the bacon in order to render out all the fat. Add onions and cook, stirring frequently, until soft and translucent, about 3 minutes.

Pour in vinegar and scrape up the brown bits from the bottom of the pot. Pour in beans and their liquid; season with salt and pepper. Stir in radishes. Close and lock the lid. Select high pressure according to manufacturer's instructions; set timer for 5 minutes. Allow 10 to 15 minutes for pressure to build.
Release pressure carefully using the quick-release method according to manufacturer's instructions, about 5 minutes. Unlock and remove the lid.

instant-pot-vegetarian-pozole.name: Instant Pot Vegetarian Pozole
instructions: Turn on a multi-functional pressure cooker (such as Instant Pot) and select Sauté function. Add olive oil to the pot. Cook and stir onion and guajillo chiles in hot oil for 3 minutes. Add garlic, cumin, and oregano; cook for 2 minutes. Cancel Sauté function.

Pour broth, pinto beans, hominy, and enchilada sauce into the pot; stir to combine. Close and lock the lid. Select high pressure according to manufacturer's instructions; set the timer for 20 minutes. Allow 20 minutes for the pressure to build.

Release pressure carefully using the quick-release method according to manufacturer's instructions, about 5 minutes. Unlock and remove the lid. Discard guajillo chiles. Stir in cilantro and lime juice.

instant-pot-wheat-berries.name: Instant Pot Wheat Berries
instructions: Turn on a multi-functional pressure cooker (such as Instant Pot). Add water and wheat berries; stir once. Close and lock the lid. Select Manual pressure according to the manufacturer's instructions and set the timer for 27 minutes. Allow 10 to 15 minutes for pressure to build.
Release pressure using the natural-release method according to the manufacturer's instructions, about 10 minutes, then switch to the quick-release method, about 5 minutes. Unlock and remove the lid.
Drain wheat berries and mix in salt.

italian-chocolate-balls-tuttu-balls.name: Italian Chocolate Balls (tuttu Balls)
instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Spread almonds onto a baking sheet.
Bake almonds until toasted and fragrant, 5 to 10 minutes. Remove baking sheet from oven and cool almonds slightly; chop.

Sift flour 2 times. Mix cocoa powder, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt together with flour in a bowl. Beat white sugar, shortening, and eggs together in a separate bowl using an electric mixer until smooth and creamy.

Mix creamed mixture into flour mixture. Add almonds, evaporated milk, and vanilla extract to flour mixture and mix well using your hands or a large spoon until dough holds together and is smooth. Roll dough into 1-inch balls and place on a baking sheet.
Bake in the oven until bottoms are slightly brown, about 10 minutes. Transfer cookies to a wire rack to cool completely.
Stir confectioners' sugar and almond extract together in a bowl; add enough water to make a thin frosting. Roll cookies in the frosting and place on a wire rack to dry.

italian-dressing.name: Italian Dressing
instructions: Add garlic, oregano, parsley, basil, salt, pepper, white wine vinegar, and olive oil into a mason jar and secure lid tightly.
Shake vigorously until ingredients are mixed thoroughly.
Store dressing in the fridge and use within 1-2 weeks. You may need to shake up the ingredients again before each use.
Enjoy!

italian-meatballs-in-marinara-sauce.name: Italian Meatballs In Marinara Sauce
instructions: Blend ketchup and milk together in a bowl. Mix in beef, egg, bread crumbs, and Greek seasoning to combine.
Heat marinara sauce to a simmer in a 2-quart pot over low heat.

Roll beef mixture with your hands to form meatballs. Drop into the simmering sauce. Add sugar and cayenne pepper. Cook, stirring gently and regularly, until meatballs are no longer pink and sauce is heated through, 25 to 30 minutes.

italian-style-cod-teleculinaria.name: Italian Style Cod
instructions: Throw the cod in a pot, add cold water and bring it to the heat until boiling. Turn off the fire and let the cod cool in the water. Then pour it, pass the water through a strainer and lie down to another pot. Clean the cod of skins and spines and chip it. Reserve.

Peel off the onions and garlic, pick it all up, throw the garlic into a pot, add the olive oil, take it to the fire and let it cook until it gets golden. Add the onion, stir and let it cook until it becomes transparent. Then add the chopped naked tomato and the oregano, stir and let cook for 5 minutes.

De seguida, acrescente o bacalhau, mexa e deixe cozinhar, em lume brando, por mais 3 minutos. Junte as rodelas de azeitona, retifique o sal, tempere com uma pitada de pimenta acabada de moer e envolva bem.

Light the pot with cod water, boil, season with salt, add the spaghetti, stir and let it cook for 9 minutes. Then pour, lie in a bowl, add the cod mixture and serve, if you like, sprinkled with grated cheese.

2-ingredient-dough-air-fryer-blueberry-b.name: 2-ingredient Dough Air Fryer Blueberry Bagels
instructions: Place blueberries in a small bowl, and pour boiling water over them. Let sit for 5 minutes, and drain
Add flour, yogurt, and blueberries to a large stand mixer bowl. Using the dough hook, mix at low speed for about 3 minutes. If you're using a KitchenAid mixer, use speed 3. Dough will be crumbly.

Transfer the dough to a lightly floured surface. Divide the dough into 4 equal balls, pressing, stretching, and rolling into ropes that are about 8 inches long, 3/4-inch thick. Connect the ends pinching into a bagel shape with hole in the middle.

Preheat an air fryer to 138°C (137 degrees C) for about 3 minutes. Combine the egg and water, and brush on each bagel, then sprinkle with cinnamon sugar. Line the air fryer basket with a parchment liner or lightly spray with cooking spray.

Place the bagels in the basket not touching, and cook until golden brown, 15 to 16 minutes. Don't crowd the basket, and cook in two batches if necessary. Your time may vary depending on the size and brand of your air fryer.
Remove the bagels to a rack, and cool for about 10 minutes before slicing.

2-ingredient-rotel-bean-dip.name: 2-ingredient Rotel Bean Dip

ingredients.item: Diced tomatoes with lime juice and cilantro

instructions: Drain Rotel, and reserve liquid.
Combine tomatoes and black beans in a blender; blend until smooth.
Add reserved liquid, a little at a time; blend until dip reaches desired consistency.
